description: Sector overlay for accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation in South Africa.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Companies Act, 2008
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / CIPC / dtic

primary_sources.name: Financial Reporting Standards Council under the Companies Act
primary_sources.issuer: Department of Trade, Industry and Competition

primary_sources.name: Auditing Profession Act, 2005 and IRBA regulatory framework
Financial Intelligence Centre Act, 2001 and FIC compliance guidance
Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013 (POPIA)
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

rules.title: IRBA registration or registered-auditor evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for IRBA, registered auditor, audit firm registration, or audit-practice oversight evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial reporting standards or Companies Act reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for annual financial statements, financial reporting standards, Companies Act, IFRS, or FRSC-relevant reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audit independence, ethics, or quality-management evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for auditor independence, audit quality, professional ethics, engagement quality, or quality-management evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT controls are present where the accounting service is an accountable institution
rules.summary: Checks for CDD, beneficial ownership, RMCP, suspicious transaction reporting, or FIC registration evidence where applicable.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Client confidentiality and personal-information protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for confidentiality, POPIA, personal information, client records, and data protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
